vision.problem: Independent makers sell through social DMs and spreadsheets; buyers cannot discover, trust, or pay them safely in one place.
vision.success:
Conversion rate ≥ 3%
Month-2 retention ≥ 40% for sellers
Revenue / cost-saving target of $50k GMV/month

decisions.title: Stripe Connect for payouts
decisions.rationale: Compliant marketplace payouts without money-transmitter licensing

decisions.title: Search with Postgres FTS first

claudeMd:
## Tech Stack
- Frontend: React 18 + Vite + TypeScript
- Backend: Node.js + Express
- Database: PostgreSQL
- State: React Query + Context

## Structure
- /client/src/features - feature modules (UI + hooks)
- /client/src/ui       - presentational components
- /server/src          - API + services

## Patterns
- Feature-based folders, not technical layers
- API calls only via /client/src/services/api.ts
- TypeScript strict mode

## Constraints
- No direct fetch() in components
- Server owns all validation
architectureStyle: Architecture: client–server full-stack web app (frontend + backend API + database).
platforms: Responsive web app — modern evergreen browsers.
teamSkills: Team context: small team or solo — favour simple, low-maintenance stacks; avoid single-person dependency.
budgetDirection: Budget: targeted — invest in differentiators, outsource/commoditise everything else.
Budget: prioritise speed to market over cost.
deliveryGovernance: Approach: evolutionary architecture — decide at the last responsible moment.
Approach: decisions recorded as ADRs in the repo.
testingStrategy: Testing: unit tests for core logic.
Testing: end-to-end tests of key flows.
cicd: CI/CD: separate dev, staging & production environments.
CI/CD: ephemeral preview environments per PR.
CI/CD: feature flags for safe rollout.
performanceScale: Scale: caching (CDN / app / DB) to meet targets.
deliveryContext: Context: greenfield — a brand-new build from scratch.
monetization: Monetization: take a fee on marketplace transactions.
security: Security: TLS 1.2+ for all traffic; HSTS.
Security: encrypt sensitive data at rest.
Security: defend against the OWASP Top 10 (injection, XSS, CSRF, etc.).
Security: validate & sanitise all input at trust boundaries.
Security: tamper-evident audit log of sensitive actions.
dataPrivacy: Data: identify & protect PII; minimise collection.
Data: capture & honour user consent for data use.
Data: automated backups + tested disaster recovery.
localization: i18n: store UTC; display in the user timezone.
integrations: Store files in S3-compatible object storage.
apiDelivery: API is internal/private — not publicly exposed.
designNotes: Build with Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui components and design tokens.
Meet WCAG 2.1 AA: contrast, labels, focus order, ARIA.
Design mobile-first; fluid layouts up to desktop.
Validate flows with the target user types before build.
